description: This file contains repository functions for managing documents and extracted text in a PostgreSQL database, including creating documents, fetching by ID, upserting extracted text, and retrieving latest documents or texts based on user and category.

methods.name: createDocument
methods.description: Creates a new document record in the database with provided input data.

methods.name: getDocumentById
methods.description: Fetches a document by its ID from the database.

methods.name: upsertExtractedText
methods.description: Inserts extracted text for a document, preserving history.

methods.name: getLatestExtractedText
methods.description: Retrieves the most recent extracted text for a document.

methods.name: getLatestDocumentForUserByCategory
methods.description: Fetches the latest document for a user within a specific category.
